mapper.select: select count(1) from comments where article_id = #{articleId}

select A.slug as articleSlug, A.title as articleTitle, A.description as articleDescription, count(AF.user_id) as favoriteCount, U.id as userId, U.username as userUsername, U.bio as userBio, U.image as userImage from articles A inner join article_favorites AF on A.id = AF.article_id left join users U on U.id = A.user_id where A.created_at >= datetime('now', '-' || #{daysAgo} || ' days') group by A.id order by favoriteCount desc limit #{limit}
